text.tspan: Share of population living in severe multidimensional poverty
Severe multidimensional poverty is defined as being highly deprived in a range of health, education and living
Data source: Alkire, Kanagaratnam and Suppa (2024) - The Global Multidimensional Poverty Index (MPI) 2024
Note: Estimates based on the most recent household survey data (between 2011 and 2023).
